creator: umq@ueo.co.jp
text:
Hi,

At Fri, 22 Mar 2013 12:20:30 +0000,
Max Brazhnikov wrote:
> Is there any strong reason to build graphics/libwmf with X11 support
> by default? As I understand it builds simple gui frontend, while
> most if not all ports which depends on graphics/libwmf need only the
> library.
> If so, can you consider to disable X11 in graphics/libwmf, and
> remove libwmf-nox11 port?

I don't know why the original porter made it default.
If there's an option which users may choose, making it possible is
preferable.

With OptionsNG, ``disable X11 by default'' can be done just add
OPTIONS_UNSET= X11
to /etc/make.conf.
This could be applied to all ports which have X11 option.

So, I don't think there's strong reason to remove libwmf-nox11 slave.


Regards,
-- 

	Hirohisa Yamaguchi
	  umq@ueo.co.jp
